div.p: Non-contiguous memory regions tracked via singly-linked list

g.text: Solid orange → Chunk list linkage (next pointers)
Dashed blue → Chunk owns memory region
Gray gaps = Non-contiguous virtual address space

div.p: Key Insight: Chunks are allocated separately from their block storage. User writes cannot corrupt chunk metadata. Each malloc(sizeof(Chunk)) creates metadata; each aligned_alloc() creates block storage.
